title: What do you think of EVANGELION VOX

wikitext:
[]: What do you think of EVANGELION VOX?             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Wed Mar 02, 2011 1:42 pm I've recently listened to this CD and I have to say that its pretty good. I'm usually not one for rap or R&B, but they managed to make it work. My favorite tracks are 15: Utopia (II Air), and 18: Star (F-02, Jikai Yokoku). So, your thoughts?

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Wed Mar 02, 2011 2:36 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by steve_stevenson » Fri Mar 04, 2011 7:12 pm its one of the dumbest things I have ever heard

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Mar 04, 2011 11:56 pm I think it's hilarious.
